# variance-lab

Local inference model evaluation against Anthropic baselines.

## Structured Data

- data/results.jsonl — 200 run metrics (wall_seconds, tokens, tok/s per model×task×pass)
- data/models.tsv — 10 models with endpoint, tier, params, family
- data/tasks.tsv — 5 tasks with baseline costs and quality grades

## Query Examples

Models by tier:
  jq -r 'select(.tier=="execution")' data/models.tsv

Results for a task:
  jq 'select(.task=="code-refactor")' data/results.jsonl

## Source

Raw outputs in output/run-*/. Methodology in routing-table.md and findings/.
